tests.name: Detects missing CLAUDE.md and prompts user
tests.description: When CLAUDE.md is missing, git-commit should detect it and prompt for project type
setup: cd /tmp/test-git-commit-1 && echo 'test' > test.txt && git add test.txt

tests.name: Routes to java-git-commit for type: java
tests.description: When CLAUDE.md declares type: java, git-commit should redirect to java-git-commit
setup: cd /tmp/test-git-commit-2 && echo '## Project Type\n\n**Type:** java' > CLAUDE.md && git add CLAUDE.md

tests.name: Routes to custom-git-commit for type: custom
tests.description: When CLAUDE.md declares type: custom, git-commit should redirect to custom-git-commit
setup: cd /tmp/test-git-commit-3 && echo '## Project Type\n\n**Type:** custom' > CLAUDE.md && git add CLAUDE.md

tests.name: Handles type: skills directly
tests.description: When CLAUDE.md declares type: skills, git-commit should handle directly (not redirect)
setup: cd /tmp/test-git-commit-4 && echo '## Project Type\n\n**Type:** skills' > CLAUDE.md && git add CLAUDE.md

tests.name: Handles type: generic directly
tests.description: When CLAUDE.md declares type: generic, git-commit should handle directly (basic mode)
setup: cd /tmp/test-git-commit-5 && echo '## Project Type\n\n**Type:** generic' > CLAUDE.md && git add CLAUDE.md

tests.name: Invokes skill-review when SKILL.md staged (type: skills)
tests.description: When SKILL.md files are staged in a skills repo, git-commit should invoke skill-review
setup: cd /tmp/test-git-commit-6 && echo '## Project Type\n\n**Type:** skills' > CLAUDE.md

cd /tmp/test-git-commit-6 && mkdir test-skill && echo '---
name: test-skill
description: Use when testing
---
# Test' > test-skill/SKILL.md

tests.name: Invokes update-readme when README.md exists and skill changes (type: skills)
tests.description: When README.md exists and SKILL.md staged in skills repo, git-commit should invoke update-readme
setup: cd /tmp/test-git-commit-7 && echo '## Project Type\n\n**Type:** skills' > CLAUDE.md

cd /tmp/test-git-commit-7 && mkdir test-skill && echo '---
name: test-skill
description: Use when testing
---
# Test' > test-skill/SKILL.md
cd /tmp/test-git-commit-7 && git add CLAUDE.md README.md test-skill/SKILL.md

tests.name: Invokes update-claude-md when CLAUDE.md exists
tests.description: When CLAUDE.md exists, git-commit should invoke update-claude-md
setup: cd /tmp/test-git-commit-8 && echo '## Project Type\n\n**Type:** generic' > CLAUDE.md
